name: Roasted Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and carrot in oil over medium heat, stirring occasionally until tender.
2. Cut tomatoes into fourths and drain.
3. Add onion, carrot, tomatoes, basil, sugar, salt, and ground red pepper to a food processor or blender.
4. Process ingredients until well blended.
5. Serve warm or cold. Makes about 3 1/2 cups sauce.
